metadata.title: MNIST Improvement Plan
metadata.objective: Improve MNIST accuracy above baseline without exceeding latency budget.

tasks.task: Add rotation and affine augmentation to training transforms
tasks.scope: TRY: Train with RandomRotation(10) and RandomAffine(degrees=10, translate=(0.1,0.1)) on MNIST train split. FILES: pipeline/train.py. CHANGE: Add transforms after ToTensor in the existing Compose; keep Normalize unchanged. VERIFY: python eval/run_eval.py --quick with accuracy >= 0.990 and latency_ms <= 13.0.
must_not_do: Do not change eval/run_eval.py gate logic.

tasks.task: Add CosineAnnealingLR scheduler to Adam training
tasks.scope: TRY: Retrain MnistCNN for 3 epochs with CosineAnnealingLR(T_max=epochs). FILES: pipeline/train.py. CHANGE: Instantiate scheduler after optimizer; call scheduler.step() each epoch. VERIFY: python eval/run_eval.py --quick with accuracy >= 0.992 and latency_ms <= 13.0.
